ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "cust_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer resides */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province where the customer resides */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the customer resides */,
  "customer_segment" TEXT /* Segment of the customer (e.g., SMALL BUSINESS, CONSUMER, CORPORATE) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the customer joined */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred contact method of the customer */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address of the customer */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cust_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_customer_segment FOREIGN KEY ("customer_segment") REFERENCES customer_segments ("segment_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_province FOREIGN KEY ("province") REFERENCES provinces ("province_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each province */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the province is located */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applicable to the province */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "province_code" TEXT /* Code of the province the region belongs to */,
  "region_manager" TEXT /* Name of the region manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segments" (
  "segment_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each customer segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer segment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the customer segment */,
  "discount_rate" REAL /* Discount rate offered to the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "cust_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., call, email, in-person visit) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_details" TEXT /* Details of the interaction */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the interaction resolution */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_cust_id FOREIGN KEY ("cust_id") REFERENCES customers ("cust_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "cust_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the purchase */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Shipping cost of the purchase */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount applicable to the purchase */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_cust_id FOREIGN KEY ("cust_id") REFERENCES customers ("cust_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level of the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity of the product */,
  "product_manager" TEXT /* Name of the product manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase item */,
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the purchase */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  "item_price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of purchase */,
  "line_total" REAL /* Total amount of the line item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_items_purchase_id FOREIGN KEY ("purchase_id") REFERENCES purchases ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales representative, marketing manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view customer, create purchase) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the campaign */,
  "target_segment" TEXT /* Target customer segment */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Marketing channel used (e.g., email, social media) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_campaigns_target_segment FOREIGN KEY ("target_segment") REFERENCES customer_segments ("segment_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_opportunities" (
  "opportunity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales opportunity */,
  "cust_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer associated with the opportunity */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product associated with the opportunity */,
  "opportunity_date" TEXT /* Date the opportunity was created */,
  "close_date" TEXT /* Expected close date of the opportunity */,
  "forecast_amount" REAL /* Forecasted amount of the opportunity */,
  "sales_stage" TEXT /* Current sales stage of the opportunity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opportunity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_opportunities_cust_id FOREIGN KEY ("cust_id") REFERENCES customers ("cust_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_opportunities_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "cust_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer providing feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was received */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the customer (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_cust_id FOREIGN KEY ("cust_id") REFERENCES customers ("cust_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "cust_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer providing the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was received */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the customer (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_cust_id FOREIGN KEY ("cust_id") REFERENCES customers ("cust_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
